title: Renting Without Getting Burned
summary: Reduce rental friction by understanding what actually protects you.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: At inspection four, everyone else has a folder and a system, and you do not.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: The rental process feels biased toward people who already know hidden rules.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Your rental application is a product package. Presentation changes outcomes.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Prepare one reusable bundle: IDs, income proof, references, and a short cover note.

Document condition reports early and verify bond lodgement to protect future disputes.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find rental support and admin services near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Medicare, Bulk-Billing & Mental Health Care Plans - your health admin layer.
